The PR adds OpenAI-compatible completions encrypted_content capture/replay, HTTP Responses previous_response_id tool continuations, and payload-shape tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives high-confidence paths: a proxy openai-responses model with trailing toolResult messages exercises the ungated previous_response_id truncation, and an encrypted-only reasoning chunk during a tool call exercises the unbudgeted replay metadata path.
